details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest 60-min running consultation after 5pm next Tuesday
Task 2: Purchase highest-rated 4-week stress program under $120
Task 3: Book two non-overlapping moderate morning classes on same Saturday
Task 4: Create weekly training plan with three cardio workouts
Task 5: Add best-value nutrition bundle under $250 based on total minutes
Task 6: Join free 7-day wellbeing email challenge starting next Monday at 8:00
Task 7: Save three short articles (running, mental resilience, nutrition) to reading list
Task 8: Build monthly gym + yoga subscription under $180
